---
title: "College Fair Information"
subtitle: "CS Quest Adventures for College Fairs"
---

# 🎓 College Fair - CS Quest Adventures

Welcome to CS Quest Adventures! This page is designed for college fairs and recruitment events.

---

## 📱 Quick Start for Students

Scan the QR code or visit this site to start learning computer science through interactive quests!

### Try It Now (No Installation!)
1. **Visit this website** on any device
2. **Choose a track:** Python, Rust, or Pygame
3. **Start coding** immediately in your browser

[🚀 Get Started Now](../index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg}

---

## 🎯 What is CS Quest Adventures?

An interactive, gamified platform for learning computer science through three distinct tracks:

### 🐍 Python Track
- **Perfect for:** Complete beginners
- **Learn:** Programming fundamentals, data structures, algorithms
- **Special Features:** In-browser Python execution, JupyterLite environment
- **Time:** 15-30 hours to complete

### 🦀 Rust Track
- **Perfect for:** Students interested in systems programming
- **Learn:** Memory safety, performance optimization, systems concepts
- **Special Features:** Rust Playground integration, parallel curriculum to Python
- **Time:** 20-40 hours to complete

### 🎮 Pygame Track
- **Perfect for:** Game development enthusiasts
- **Learn:** Game loops, collision detection, sprite animation, game design
- **Special Features:** 7 complete game projects, downloadable source code
- **Time:** 10-20 hours to complete

---

## 🏆 Why Choose CS Quest Adventures?

### ✅ No Installation Required
- Code runs directly in your browser
- No complex setup or configuration
- Works on any device (laptop, tablet, phone)

### ✅ Gamified Learning
- Medieval quest theme throughout
- Progress tracking
- Challenges and achievements

### ✅ Multiple Learning Paths
- Three complete tracks to explore
- Choose based on your interests
- Self-paced learning

### ✅ Real-World Skills
- Industry-relevant languages
- Practical projects
- Portfolio-ready work

---

## 📊 Student Testimonials

> "I went from zero coding experience to building my own games in just a few weeks!" 
> — *Student, Python → Pygame Track*

> "The quest format made learning Rust actually fun. I understand memory management now!"
> — *Student, Rust Track*

> "Being able to code in my browser without installing anything was a game-changer."
> — *Student, Python Track*

---

## 🎓 For Educators

CS Quest Adventures is designed to be:

- **Self-contained:** No server setup required
- **Scalable:** Hundreds of students can use simultaneously
- **Free:** Open source and freely available
- **Flexible:** Use as curriculum, supplement, or independent study

### Integration Options
- Classroom curriculum
- After-school program
- Independent study
- Summer coding camp
- College prep course

### Download Materials
All content is available for offline use:

- Jupyter notebooks for each quest
- Complete source code
- Setup guides
- Teaching resources

[Download All Materials →](../downloads.qmd)

---

## 🚀 Demo for Fair Attendees

### Live Demo Path (5 minutes)
1. Open [Python Quest 1: Variables](../tracks/python/lessons/01-variables.qmd)
2. Scroll to any code cell
3. Click "Run Code" — see instant results!
4. Modify the code and run again
5. Complete the challenge boxes

### Try These Highlights:
- **[Interactive Python](../tracks/python/lessons/01-variables.qmd)** - Instant code execution
- **[JupyterLite](../jupyterlite.qmd)** - Full Jupyter in browser
- **[Pygame Preview](../tracks/pygame/quests/01-maze-explorer.qmd)** - Game tutorial walkthrough

---

## 📥 Take It With You

### For Students:
1. **Bookmark this site**: `[YOUR_SITE_URL]`
2. **Start on phone**, continue on laptop
3. **No account needed** to get started

### QR Codes Available:
- Main site homepage
- Python track start
- Rust track start  
- Pygame track start

[Generate QR Codes →](../src/generate_qr_codes.py) *(for fair organizers)*

---

## 🏫 School/University Programs

Interested in bringing CS Quest Adventures to your institution?

### We Offer:
- Customization for your curriculum
- Educator training materials
- Progress tracking integration
- Institutional hosting support

**Contact:** obonhamcarter@allegheny.edu

---

## 📚 Quick Facts Sheet

**Languages Covered:** Python, Rust  
**Framework:** Pygame (game development)  
**Total Quests:** 45+ lessons/projects  
**Target Audience:** High school to university  
**Prerequisites:** None (complete beginner friendly)  
**Cost:** Free and open source  
**Platform:** Web-based, no installation  
**Browser Support:** Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge  
**Offline Mode:** Available via downloads  

---

## 🎯 Next Steps for Students

1. **[Try Python Quest 1](../tracks/python/lessons/01-variables.qmd)** - Start with variables (5 min)
2. **[Explore All Tracks](../tracks-overview.qmd)** - Compare learning paths
3. **[Read Setup Guide](../setup.qmd)** - Optional local development
4. **[Download Materials](../downloads.qmd)** - Take quests offline

---

## 🔗 Quick Links

| Resource | Link |
|----------|------|
| **Homepage** | [CS Quest Adventures](../index.qmd) |
| **Python Track** | [Start Python Quests](../tracks/python/index.qmd) |
| **Rust Track** | [Start Rust Quests](../tracks/rust/index.qmd) |
| **Pygame Track** | [Start Game Development](../tracks/pygame/index.qmd) |
| **JupyterLite** | [Launch Full Environment](../jupyterlite.qmd) |
| **Setup Guide** | [Local Installation](../setup.qmd) |
| **FAQ** | [Common Questions](../sitedocs/faq.md) |

---

## 📸 Fair Booth Materials

For recruiters and educators staffing booths:

- **[Presentation Slides]** *(create if needed)*
- **[Printed Handouts]** *(create if needed)*
- **[QR Code Sheet]** - Generate via `src/create_qr_sheet.py`
- **[Demo Script]** *(this page serves as script)*

---

[🚀 Start Your Quest Now](../index.qmd){.btn .btn-success .btn-lg}

[← Back to Home](../index.qmd)
